title: Odyssey, Book 15: The Return of Telemachus
description: Book 15 of Homer's Odyssey: The Return of Telemachus.
introduction: Book 15 of the Odyssey: The Return of Telemachus. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Ἡ δ᾿ ἐς Λακεδαίμονα δῖαν ἔβη Παλλὰς Ἀθήνη.
translation.text: Athena went to Sparta and urged Telemachus to return home. He sailed back to Ithaca, avoiding the suitors' ambush. He went first to Eumaeus' hut, as Athena had instructed.
